findings.title: Homepage title is just the brand
findings.recommendation: Fine for a known brand; consider "Brand — what you do" (~50–60 chars) to also rank for the value proposition.

findings.title: Missing meta description
findings.recommendation: Add a compelling 140–160 character summary with the target query.

findings.title: No H1 heading
findings.recommendation: Add a single H1 that states the page's main topic.

findings.title: No canonical URL
findings.recommendation: Add a self-referencing canonical to consolidate signals.

findings.title: Images missing alt text
findings.detail: 2 of 2 tags have no alt attribute.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text (empty alt="" only for decorative images).

findings.title: Links with no anchor text
findings.recommendation: Give links descriptive anchor text for users and crawlers.

findings.title: Generic anchor text
findings.recommendation: Use keyword-relevant anchor text describing the destination.

findings.title: No XML sitemap found
findings.detail: No sitemap.xml at the common locations or in robots.txt.
findings.recommendation: Publish an XML sitemap and submit it in Search Console.

findings.title: Content is on the short side
findings.recommendation: Consider deepening coverage if this is a primary landing page.

findings.title: Dominant topics detected
findings.detail: points (30), ago (30), hide (30), comments (29), hours (27), google (4)  ·  phrases: ago hide, hide comments, hours ago

findings.title: Body may not reinforce the title topic
findings.detail: None of the title/H1 keywords appear among the page's most frequent body terms.
findings.recommendation: Make sure the main content actually develops the topic promised by the title and H1 (helps ranking and AI topical grounding).

findings.title: Incomplete Open Graph tags
findings.recommendation: Add og:title, og:description and og:image for rich social and chat-app link previews.

findings.title: No Twitter/X card type
findings.recommendation: Add twitter:card (e.g. summary_large_image) for X previews.

findings.title: No structured data (JSON-LD)
findings.detail: The page has no application/ld+json markup.
findings.recommendation: Add JSON-LD for the page's entity (Article, Product, Organization…) to unlock rich results and clarify meaning for AI search. (Least critical on listing/index pages.)

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.recommendation: Optionally publish /llms.txt to guide AI crawlers to your key content. Evidence for ranking impact is still thin — treat as low-cost, low-certainty.
